search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:wirelessdevicesethernetstatuses" $orgid$ | dedup serial | rename name as "Device Name", ports{}.name as "Ports Name", ports{}.linkNegotiation.duplex as "Duplex", ports{}.linkNegotiation.speed as "Speed", ports{}.poe.standard as "POE Standard" | table "Device Name", "Ports Name", "Duplex", "Speed", "POE Standard"

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:wirelessdevicesethernetstatuses" $orgid$ | dedup serial | rename power.ac.isConnected as ac , power.poe.isConnected as poe | where ac="null" AND poe="null" | rename name as "Device Name", serial as "Serial", network.id as "Network ID" | table "Device Name", "Serial", "Network ID"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:wirelessdevicesethernetstatuses" $orgid$ | dedup serial | rename power.ac.isConnected as ac , power.poe.isConnected as poe | where ac="null" AND poe="null" | search name="$row.Device Name$" serial="$row.Serial$" network.id="$row.Network ID$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:wirelessdevicesethernetstatuses" $orgid$ | dedup serial | rename ports{}.poe.standard as "POE Standard" | stats count by "POE Standard"
`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:wirelessdevicesethernetstatuses" $orgid$ | dedup serial | rename ports{}.linkNegotiation.speed as "Port Speed" | stats count by "Port Speed"

panel.title: Wireless Device Ethernet Status | Aggregation Status

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:wirelessdevicesethernetstatuses" $orgid$ | dedup serial | rename aggregation.enabled as aggregation_enabled | eval aggregation_status=if(aggregation_enabled="true", "Enabled", "Disabled") | rename aggregation_status as "Aggregation Status" | stats count by "Aggregation Status"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:wirelessdevicesethernetstatuses" $orgid$ | dedup serial | rename aggregation.enabled as aggregation_enabled | eval aggregation_status=if(aggregation_enabled="true", "Enabled", "Disabled") | search aggregation_status="$click.value$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:wirelessdevicesethernetstatuses" $orgid$ | rename ports{}.linkNegotiation.speed as port_speed, network.id as "Network ID" | stats avg(port_speed) as AvgSpeed, max(port_speed) as "Max Speed", min(port_speed) as "Min Speed" by "Network ID" | eval "Avg Speed"=round(AvgSpeed,2) | table "Network ID", "Avg Speed","Max Speed", "Min Speed"

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:wirelessdevicesethernetstatuses" $orgid$ | dedup serial | rename power.poe.isConnected as poe_connected, network.id as "Network ID" | search poe_connected="true" | stats count by "Network ID" | sort -count
`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:wirelessdevicesethernetstatuses" $orgid$ | dedup serial | rename power.mode as "Power Mode" | stats count by "Power Mode"
